extension_description.message: Secure two-factor authentication with 100% transparent code

ui_site_integration.description: Settings section title for per-site integration

ui_site_integration_desc.message: Enable the in-page 2FA picker button only on sites you choose.

ui_enable_for_current_site.description: Button label to grant permission for current site

ui_disable_for_current_site.description: Button label to revoke permission for current site

messages_site_access_not_available.message: Site access is not available for this page.
messages_site_access_not_available.description: Status when current tab is not an http(s) page

messages_site_access_enabled.description: Status text when site integration enabled

messages_site_access_disabled.description: Status text when site integration disabled

messages_site_access_enabled_short.description: Toast text after enabling site integration

messages_site_access_disabled_short.description: Toast text after disabling site integration

messages_permission_denied.description: Toast text when user denies permission prompt

messages_permission_request_failed.description: Toast text when permission request fails

messages_permission_remove_failed.description: Toast text when permission remove fails

ui_drive_backup.description: Settings section title for Drive backup

ui_drive_backup_desc.message: Store an encrypted backup in your Google Drive app data (hidden). You control the encryption password.

ui_drive_backup_now.description: Button label to trigger Drive backup

ui_drive_restore.description: Button label to restore from Drive

ui_drive_backup_password.description: Label for Drive backup encryption password

ui_drive_restore_confirm.message: This will import accounts from your latest Drive backup. Continue?

messages_drive_not_connected_hint.description: Initial hint in Drive backup section

messages_drive_backup_in_progress.description: Status while backing up to Drive

messages_drive_no_backup_found.description: Message when no Drive backup exists

ui_drive_backup_password_hint.message: This password is not stored. Keep it safe.
